notes: Generic update endpoint for any T-block content/settings.
Field names depend on the T-block's content schema. Examples:
T0868 (HTML popup):  code (HTML body), linkhook (popup activation selector like '#mypopup')
T2441 (form):        title, descr, formstyle, formsubmittxt, formsubmitcolor, etc. (TBD per-block)
linkhook fields rewrite the popup CSS hook — passing custom values lets multiple popups coexist on the same page.
URLSearchParams encoding required; field values are URL-encoded.
important: We do NOT yet have a list of valid field names per T-block. Caller passes whatever {key:value} they want via the `patch` MCP arg; Tilda silently ignores unknown fields. To discover fields, observe network traffic when editing a real block in the editor UI.
